_comment: Integration ILASP config. GRD needs ILASP --version=2i: ILASP 4.4.1 v4 has
a reproducible SPURIOUS UNSATISFIABLE on ~1/6 of no-choice GRD tasks
_diag_core.las; likely conflict-analysis incompleteness triggered by the
conditional literal in supported/1). train_test.run_ilasp hardcodes
'ILASP --version=4' and appends these ilasp_args AFTER it; ILASP takes the
LAST --version flag (verified: the v4-UNSAT task solves correctly under
'ILASP --version=4 --version=2i'), so this injection works today. The
clean repo patch makes the version a first-class per-semantics option.
